description: action invoice drafts a record and stops at the consequential gate
assertions: the draft comes from tools/finance.py with computed_by provenance
the confirmation summary restates amount, counterparty, and terms and asks for an explicit yes
nothing is sent; with flags off nothing is written and the _gate reason is shown

description: action ar reports the whole book read-only
assertions: runs with all finance flags off (read-only discipline)
figures are the tool's exact-decimal strings
disputed invoices are separated and excluded from outstanding
a single deal_id input adds the invoice-status per-deal narrative

description: action estimate builds a sourced cost projection (chunk 6 atom)
assertions: every line carries its source; assumptions are labeled
capex and expense are split; totals computed by cost_rollup
the CPA boundary line is present
unknown costs are gaps, never guesses

description: action price computes a floor and names the binding constraint
assertions: price_floor is max(cost floor, negotiation floor) with the bound named
a floor above the benchmark range is flagged, not hidden
the output is decision support; the consequential gate precedes any external quote
feeds pitch-paragraph and contract-draft without re-computing
